required_preferences.fact: Lets her friend group rotate hosting book club during her extended work travel—does not host while away from Seattle

supersedes.fact: Always hosts the monthly book club at her home—never rotates location with the group

required_preferences.fact: Keeps all screens off for 30 minutes before bed—reads only physical books or meditates in the bedroom, as per sleep hygiene advice

supersedes.fact: Reads on her e-reader for 20 minutes before bed each night—never scrolls on her phone in bed

required_preferences.fact: Uses hospital waiting room downtime to coordinate work or personal tasks on her phone—prefers asynchronous messaging and avoids live meetings during these periods
Prefers hotel-provided vegetarian boxed lunches during work travel—avoids restaurant meals unless dining with team
Joins faculty lunch meetups at UW on teaching days—prefers connecting with fellow instructors and avoids eating alone on campus
Spends the first hour of every Monday mapping out detailed design priorities—never schedules meetings before 10am that day

persona: A 38-year-old software architect with a background in machine learning
